title: Amtech B3771 1000 6mm Staples
features: USE WITH AMTECH B3770: This pack of 1000 6mm staples is suitable for use with Amtech's staple gun (stock code B3770)
HEAVY-DUTY BUILD: Made from robust materials to withstand regular use.
PRACTICAL SIZE: 6mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 1000Pc 6Mm Staples See more
